focus: Prepare repository for public GitHub visibility with an MDE-focused README and public-readiness checks.
reasonStarted: The founder asked to commit and push current changes, update the README to explain MDE concepts, and make the GitHub repository public.

new: The public README should explain the product mission and how the repository uses Mission-Driven Engineering.
The public README should describe artifact lanes, generations, validation, demand data contracts, and deployment discipline without exposing secrets.
Public-readiness review should confirm committed env files do not contain private credentials.
reused: Phase 1 status remains deployed and founder-testable.
MDE human, agent, and deploy artifact lanes remain separate.
Secrets stay in local environment files or provider secret storage.

validation.readmeReview: README updated to focus on mission, MDE artifact lanes, generations, validation, demand data contracts, and deployment discipline.
validation.secretScan: No private key, common token, Cloudflare token, admin secret, or concrete PageSpeed API key pattern found in tracked files. .env.example contains only an empty PAGESPEED_API_KEY placeholder.
validation.productTests: not rerun because this generation changes documentation and metadata only

knownRisks: Repository visibility will expose MDE process artifacts and product code publicly.
Future work must continue to keep local env files, credentials, private customer data, and unpublished client secrets out of git.
